name: Informant
description: The city speaks to those who know how to listen. You learned where secrets travel, how rumors grow, and which words open locked doors. Every whisper is a thread, and you know how to follow them to the source.

feats.name: Drudge Out
feats.description: You are always ambitious about gathering information. When used, you gain Resolve on **Skill Checks** related to **Lore**, **Social** or **Intuition**.
